_metadata.note: MSA affix rules for common noun/adjective clitics, case endings, number/gender suffixes, and finite verb affixes. Root-and-pattern morphology is handled by dedicated analyzers.

sources.title: FSI Written Arabic Course

sources.usage: Reference for classical/MSA inflection classes, case endings, pronoun suffixes, and finite verb affixes.
